task_completion.description: Open the 'freight_analysis.xlsx' workbook in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet application (like Microsoft Excel) is open, and the title bar or window header clearly shows the filename 'freight_analysis.xlsx'.

task_completion.description: Calculate the required metrics in the 'Lane_Analysis' sheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Lane_Analysis' sheet is active. Columns for Shipment_Count, Avg_Rate_Per_Mile, Total_Lane_Cost, Avg_Weight_Lbs, On_Time_Pct, and Cost_Per_CWT contain calculated values. The formula bar should ideally show an Excel formula (e.g., SUMIFS, AVERAGEIFS) when one of these cells is selected.

task_completion.description: Calculate the required metrics in the 'Carrier_Scorecard' sheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Carrier_Scorecard' sheet is active. Columns for Total_Shipments, Total_Revenue, On_Time_Pct, Temp_Compliance_Pct, Overall_Score, and Rank contain calculated values. The formula bar should show an Excel formula when one of these cells is selected.

task_completion.description: Calculate the required metrics in the 'Rate_Benchmarking' sheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Rate_Benchmarking' sheet is active. Columns for Variance, Variance %, Status (showing OVER, UNDER, or IN RANGE), and Annual_Overspend contain calculated values. The formula bar should show an Excel formula (such as an IF statement for the Status column) when a cell is selected.

task_completion.description: Save the updated workbook to its original location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Save' icon (floppy disk), uses the File > Save menu, presses Ctrl+S, or successfully closes the application without an unsaved changes warning.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical spreadsheet application (e.g., Excel) rather than terminal commands or Python scripts to modify the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Excel GUI being interacted with directly, rather than a terminal window running scripts like pandas.

integrity.description: The agent used formulas for calculations rather than hardcoding the answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: When a calculated cell is selected in any of the three sheets, the formula bar displays an actual formula (starting with '=') rather than a static typed number or text string.

integrity.description: The agent modified the existing target file rather than creating a new one from scratch.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file being edited is 'freight_analysis.xlsx' and contains the original 'Shipment_Data' sheet, indicating the agent opened the provided file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected file is 'freight_analysis.xlsx' located at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\freight_analysis.xlsx'. The passing threshold for this task is 60/100 points. The task requires the use of formulas for all calculations across the three specified sheets.
